data.content: 1. Acceptance requires the UI to display an action to update now when a newer version is available, but src/components/version-badge.tsx:42-47 renders a non-interactive span with 'Update now to v{result.latestVersion}' and provides no button, link, or handler to perform an update. 2. Test coverage does not verify the required behavior. src/components/__tests__/version-badge.test.ts only checks server-rendered static markup and never exercises clicking the pill, fetching /api/version?force=1, the update-available branch, or the 'Latest version installed' branch.
